caption:
@jacksdiningroom reveals his TOP-3 food experiences in Tokyo, Japan! Joined by 2x Michelin Star chef Philip Frankland Lee... Full video available via the link in bio!
#atthediningroom #tokyo #japan
transcript: my three favorite restaurants so far in tokyo yeah one which you put us onto which i think was the best recommendation i maybe have ever had it's this underground restaurant where you walk down these stairs and almost like into this you feel like you're walking back into like the 1500s what tokyo used to be and they're famous for salmon roe when you get in you take your shoes off and you sit down and pretty much you just hang out with like all your friends at this table with your shoes off you drink a thousand beers and then they come over with this huge gong and they present you this salmon roe and they they dump it in this bowl and they give you so much they put a plate under because it starts overflowing and it's just salmon roe over rice and they have wasabi and soy sauce on the side that restaurant and the experience the vibe there it's kind of smoky from the ikazaya and they're serving sashimi and different wagyu beef in the sandro that's what i look for when i go to cities is those underground kind of hidden restaurants where you can just hang out with friends and it's no frills and the food's amazing that was one of the best recommendations i've ever had
